title: rubus podophyllos subsp. decipiens
intro: Rubus podophyllos subsp. decipiens, also known as Himalayan bramble or Himalayan raspberry, is a subspecies of the bramble plant native to the Himalayan region. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Rubus podophyllos subsp. decipiens include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as having antimicrobial properties that help to prevent infection. The plant can be prepared for herbal use by making a decoction or infusion from the leaves, stems, and roots, which can be used to treat various health issues.
